title: Vacancy for Teacher at IIM Bangalore

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Teacher at IIM Bangalore
jsonLd.description:
IIM Bangalore, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Rajkot operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Bangalore:
IIM Bangalore is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Support students with special educational needs
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Bangalore!
